amenities.definition: Desirable or useful features or facilities of a building or place
amenities.examples: Amenities: Ski Storage, Swimming Pool, Restaurant

styles.examples: Styles: Wingback, Button Tufted, French Country, Swivel, Nailhead, Scalloped

types.definition: Categories or variants of a product or service
types.examples: Types: LED, Incandescent, Halogen, Fluorescent, Metal Halide

destinations.definition: Geographic entities - cities, states, countries, etc.
destinations.examples: Destinations: Las Vegas, New York, Tokyo, Rome, Cancun, Paris

services.examples: Services: Oil change, Smog check, tire alignment

courses.examples: Courses: Linear Algebra, Creative Writing, Data Structures

neighborhoods.examples: Neighborhoods: Downtown, Hayes Valley, Mission, Excelsior

shows.examples: Shows: The Voyage, Knights, American Dancer

insurance_coverage.definition: Types of coverage offered by insurance companies

degree_programs.definition: Major subjects of study at an educational institution

featured_hotels.examples: Featured hotels: Luxury Inn, Alpine Lodge, Lakeside Hotel
